offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient collections causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable management instead of manual tracking of invoices and collections.
problem: inefficient collections process leading to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and overdue reminders
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import feature for existing data
